description: An aerial or satellite map displays a suburban landscape with a mix of impervious surfaces, vegetated areas, and cleared land. A north arrow is in the top-left corner, and a scale bar indicates "200 m" in the bottom-left. The upper part of the image shows a developed area with numerous residential buildings (distinguished by red-tiled roofs), an organized road network including a roundabout, and several larger building complexes (one with tennis courts, another with a large dark roof, possibly commercial). To the south and west, the developed area borders a dense forest. Further south, within the forested region, is a large area of light-coloured, striped land, possibly recently cleared or cultivated. Three distinct clusters of buildings within the developed zone are highlighted by red outlines, indicating specific areas of focus.
